articles.title: Independent directors should act responsibly: Pandey on HDFC Bank chairman's actions
articles.description: India's market regulator Sebi will scrutinize HDFC Bank's board meeting records. This follows the sudden departure of former chairman Atanu Chakraborty. He cited ethical issues in his resignation. Sebi chairman Tuhin Kanta Pandey stated the regulator will investigate all aspects. Independent directors must act responsibly and provide evidence for their claims.

articles.title: Iran US News Live Updates: Tehran now says it's 'reviewing' a US proposal, hours after denying talks with Trump
articles.description: Iran US News Live Updates: A senior Iranian Foreign Ministry official has confirmed that Tehran received a US proposal via mediators and is reviewing it, according to CBS News. Catch LIVE updates with Mint

articles.title: 10-year yield sees steepest one-day jump since Oct 2023
articles.description: Indian bond yields saw a significant jump, reaching their highest point since January last year. This surge was driven by soaring crude oil prices and the possibility of global central banks increasing interest rates. The 10-year benchmark government bond yield rose sharply. Market sentiment remained cautious despite diplomatic efforts easing immediate tensions.

articles.title: Trying relentlessly to lessen impact of US-Iran war: PM Modi
articles.description: In a statement in Lok Sabha – his first after the war broke out – Modi called the attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz as “unacceptable”.

articles.title: Inside the alleged Russian operation to trigger anti-government protests in Angola
articles.description: A group of Russians and Angolans are going on trial in Angola after being accused of fomenting protests, which they deny.

articles.title: Supreme Court weighs public good in post-facto environmental nod debate
articles.description: The Supreme Court on Monday observed that the legislature should not be completely “denuded” from granting environmental clearances (EC) to development projects long after they have commenced work, particularly when such a decision leads to serving a higher public good such as establishment of a hospital or a public utility.

articles.title: Former personnel protest CAPF bill, submit memorandum to PM
articles.description: Retired personnel of the CAPFs and their families on Monday protested at Jantar Mantar against the government’s proposed Central Armed Police Forces (General Administration) Bill, 2026, even as opposition parties raised objections to its introduction in Parliament

articles.title: Bengal SIR: Election Commission issues supplementary list after adjudication, no clarity on deletions - The Indian Express
articles.description: Bengal SIR: Election Commission issues supplementary list after adjudication, no clarity on deletions  The Indian Express

articles.title: Market slide pushes short-term SIP returns into negative territory
articles.description: Systematic Investment Plans in equity mutual funds are showing losses over one and two-year periods. This trend is impacting investors who began after 2020. A recent market sell-off has further pushed these investments into negative territory. Experts advise continuing SIPs and topping them up to accumulate more units at current prices.

articles.title: Israeli settlers vandalise school, raise Israeli flag in occupied West Bank
articles.description: Israeli settlers have been filmed vandalising a boys’ school in Huwara.

articles.title: Sebi approves tighter conflict code, easier FPI settlement plan
articles.description: Sebi has approved new conflict-of-interest norms for its chairperson and board members, which will be sent to the Centre for legal binding. The regulator also eased settlement rules for foreign portfolio investors, aiming to attract overseas funds back to Mumbai-listed shares.

articles.title: UK universities flock to India - but will they succeed?
articles.description: Nine UK universities are setting up campuses in India, but enrolment is expected to be modest initially.

articles.title: Centre making all efforts to provide LPG for commercial use
articles.description: The Centre is making every effort through state governments, to provide scarce liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) equitably to commercial customers

articles.title: Precious metals under pressure as higher interest rate outlook dents sentiment
articles.description: Gold and silver prices experienced a significant slump on Monday, with gold futures dropping 5.6% and silver falling 11%. This decline occurred despite escalating West Asia conflict, as rising inflation fears and expectations of higher global interest rates overshadowed safe haven demand.

articles.title: Govt to evaluate technology to contain water contamination in India
articles.description: Around 200,000 people die every year in the country due to inadequate access to safe drinking water, according to Niti Aayog. Recent deaths linked to contaminated supply in Indore have raised questions over the monitoring and operational standards of water treatment plants.

articles.title: Iran war live: Tehran says Trump’s peace talk claims are ‘fake news’

articles.title: Currency woes deepen as oil fears drive rupee to historic lows
articles.description: The Indian Rupee hit a new low of 93.97 against the US Dollar on Monday. Rising crude oil prices and global tensions are weakening the currency. The Reserve Bank of India intervened to prevent a sharper fall. Analysts expect further volatility. Asian currencies also saw declines amid a global risk-off sentiment.

articles.description: The Supreme Court on Monday observed that the legislature should not be completely “denuded” from granting environmental clearances (EC) to development projects long after they have commenced work, particularly when such a decision leads to serving a higher public good such as establishment of a hospital or a public utility.

topStories.title: Backchannel begins? US sends Iran message via mediators as Trump signals deal
topStories.description: Backchannel begins US sends Iran message via mediators as Trump signals deal

topStories.title: Iran US News Live Updates: Tehran now says it's 'reviewing' a US proposal, hours after denying talks with Trump
topStories.description: Iran US News Live Updates: A senior Iranian Foreign Ministry official has confirmed that Tehran received a US proposal via mediators and is reviewing it, according to CBS News. Catch LIVE updates with Mint

topStories.title: Trying relentlessly to lessen impact of US-Iran war: PM Modi
topStories.description: In a statement in Lok Sabha – his first after the war broke out – Modi called the attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz as “unacceptable”.

topStories.title: Is Pakistan positioning itself as a mediator in the US-Iran war? Here's what we know
topStories.description: An Egyptian official told the Associated Press that the US and Iran exchanged messages over the weekend through regional intermediaries, including Egypt, Turkey and Pakistan, indicating back‑channel communications aimed at reducing tensions.

topStories.description: France’s president Emmanuel Macron said Lebanon’s fight against threats to its security is ‘just’.

topStories.description: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

dailyNews.title: People will assess governance failure, corruption and favour UDF: KPCC chief
dailyNews.description: Sunny Joseph dismisses concerns of internal dissent within the Congress over granting electoral berth to former CPI(M) leaders; he says the UDF’s decision to support such leaders will strengthen the coalition; results of local body elections indicate strong anti-incumbency sentiment, he adds

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court gives Centre four-week leeway to respond to petition on airfare hike, says govt. handling ‘bigger problems now’
dailyNews.description: Petitioner had sought steps to address fare fluctuation, fare transparency, and continuity of essential air services

dailyNews.title: What Trump said about Iran after postponing military strikes
dailyNews.description: After announcing the US will postpone strikes on Iran’s power plants, Donald Trump said Iran called him to make a deal.

dailyNews.title: Anil Ambani bank fraud case: Supreme Court says CBI, ED showed reluctance
dailyNews.description: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta promises to personally convey the court’s message to ED and CBI directors in “harsher terms”

dailyNews.title: US Comedian Bill Cosby Ordered To Pay $19 Million Over Sex Abuse Claim
dailyNews.description: The jury took three days to deliver its verdict, ordering Bill Cosby to pay $19.3 million, a figure that could increase if they add punitive damages.

dailyNews.title: Tehran residents express distrust over Trump’s war diplomacy
dailyNews.description: “If we trust him, we lose.”

dailyNews.title: Bypoll: BJP candidates richer than Congress candidates
dailyNews.description: The BJP candidates are richer compared to the Congress candidates as per their affidavits filed along with their nomination papers in the byelections to Bagalkot and Davangere South Assembly constituencies.

dailyNews.title: ‘Stop, stop, stop’: Moment Air Canada plane crashes into truck
dailyNews.description: CCTV video captured the moment an Air Canada plane collided with a fire truck at New York’s LaGuardia Airport.

dailyNews.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
dailyNews.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

dailyNews.title: ‘Don’t Make Any Deal’: Trump Tells Republicans to Hold Firm on Shutdown Talks
dailyNews.description: The president is using the standoff over funding the Department of Homeland Security as leverage to pass a strict voter ID bill. Critics say the bill would place an undue burden on eligible voters.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Pay $1 Billion to Energy Giant to Cancel Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: In exchange, the French company TotalEnergies would invest in oil and natural gas projects in Texas and elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Targets Harvard With Two New Investigations
dailyNews.description: The inquiries target antisemitism and admissions policies. The university called it retaliation for refusing to give in to the administration’s demands.

dailyNews.title: ‘Who Doesn’t Love Elvis?’ Trump Takes an Unexpected Detour to Graceland.
dailyNews.description: President Trump mused about whether he could beat Elvis Presley in a fistfight and used a golden Sharpie to sign a replica of one of the singer’s guitars.

dailyNews.title: Mullin confirmed as DHS chief as lawmakers near solution on shutdown standoff
dailyNews.description: Even with a new DHS chief, Senate Democrats aren't backing down from their demands for stringent reforms to ICE. And now President Donald Trump wants to pair funding with voter ID legislation.

dailyNews.title: Political traffic signals: waiting for the light to change on the Hill
dailyNews.description: Congress faces a steep political battle over a $200 billion Iran war spending request, with Trump sending mixed signals on whether the funds are needed.

dailyNews.title: Trump's death will be 'like Mardi Gras in New Orleans,' Charlamagne warns after Mueller post
dailyNews.description: Radio host Charlamagne Tha God warned President Donald Trump that people will celebrate his death "like Mardi Gras" after he celebrated Robert Mueller's death.

dailyNews.title: Virginia Dem admits redistricting push aims to 'stop Trump', not about 'fairness'
dailyNews.description: Virginia Rep. Donald Beyer says the redistricting push is about stopping Trump and taking back the House, not restoring fairness for Virginia voters.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin confirmed as DHS secretary in 54-45 Senate vote
dailyNews.description: The Senate confirmed Markwayne Mullin as secretary of the Department of Homeland Security on Monday, finalizing President Trump's shakeup of DHS following months of scrutiny of Kristi Noem's leadership.

dailyNews.title: DHS funding talks in limbo after Trump insists GOP pass SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: Senate talks aimed at ending the 38-day DHS shutdown hit a new roadblock after President Trump called on Republicans to hold out for passage of the SAVE America Act.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones deadline to strike Iranian power plants amid hope for peace deal
dailyNews.description: In the middle of the latest wave of the air strikes across Iran, there was a sudden about-face from President Trump, postponing for five days a deadline to "obliterate" Iran's power plants in order to break the country's siege on the Strait of Hormuz. Charlie D'Agata has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges GOP leaders not to make deal to end shutdown unless Democrats back voter ID bill
dailyNews.description: Despite the chaos at some of the nation's airports, President Trump urged Republicans not to make a deal to end the partial shutdown unless Democrats back a voter ID bill known as the SAVE America Act. Meanwhile, the president appeared more optimistic about reaching a deal with Iran. Nikole Killion has the latest.
